actionUnits.condition: GameObject lacks Rigidbody; Collider/EventTrigger not specified. The only listed MonoBehaviour on Fireplace_Traditional is fileID 631718164 (guid 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6), which does not match the provided TeleportAnchorWithFade script and exposes no known public no-arg methods. TeleportAnchorWithFade overrides XR interaction callbacks (OnSelectEntered/Exited/Activated/Deactivated), which are protected and parameterized, so they cannot be invoked by a Trigger action. To cover the fade/teleport sequence, we need confirmation of a Collider on the object, the presence and scene fileID of a TeleportAnchorWithFade (or TeleportationAnchor) component attached to Fireplace_Traditional, the teleportTrigger setting, and any UnityEvent m_Calls wired on this object.
